title: Reviewing Permission: Expressing Allowance with Can
instructions: Transforma las oraciones para que incluyan 'can' cuando algo esté permitido y 'can't' cuando no lo esté, usando 'you' para referirse a la gente en general. Por ejemplo: it's okay to pay later -> you can pay later.
translation: No se puede beber alcohol aquí.

sentenceParts.text: It's not okay to drink alcohol here.

title: Reviewing Permission: Expressing Allowance with Can

sentenceParts.text: It's okay to walk on the grass.

options: You can walk on the grass.
